query:
SELECT 
  v.id as videoId,
  v.scriptId,
  v.creatomateStatus,
  vs.id as scriptDbId
FROM videos v
JOIN videoScripts vs ON v.scriptId = vs.id
WHERE v.creatomateStatus IS NULL
AND v.scriptId IN (210001, 210002, 210003, 210004, 210005)
ORDER BY v.id;
